items.title: Celebrations in Hungary as Viktor Orbán concedes defeat
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orbán conceded defeat on Sunday after what he called a ″painful″ election result, ending 16 years in power for a powerful figure in the far-right movement allied with U.S. President Donald Trump and Russian President Vladimir Putin.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress 
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Tel Aviv residents say they are enjoying the weather as ceasefire in doubt
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Tel Aviv residents were not hopeful after the United States and Iran ended face-to-face talks on Sunday without an agreement to end the war, leaving a fragile two-week ceasefire in doubt.

items.title: Inside an LA Justin Bieber look-alike contest

items.content:
<article>Fans gathered in West Hollywood for a Justin Bieber look-alike contest during Coachella weekend, and AP was there. Take a look inside.

items.title: 23-story hotel in Miami vanishes in seconds with controlled implosion
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>According to Swire Properties, the demolition will make way for the groundbreaking of The Residences at Mandarin Oriental, Miami.

items.title: Iran delegation leaves Islamabad after ceasefire talks end without agreement
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Ceasefire talks between the U.S. and Iran ended in the early hours of Sunday without an agreement, raising questions about what happens when a current two-week truce expires on April 22.

items.title: America's 250th anniversary: Mississippi museums grapple with complicated past
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>For America's 250th anniversary, Mississippi is highlighting two museums that describe the state's contributions to the country while also reckoning with its brutal treatment of Native Americans, enslaved people and members of the Civil Rights movement. (AP Video: Sophie Bates)

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress

items.title: Hungary votes in key election that could unseat populist PM Viktor Orbán
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Hungarians were casting ballots Sunday in what is widely seen as Europe’s most consequential election this year, a vote that could unseat populist Prime Minister Viktor Orbán, an ally of U.S. President Donald Trump, after 16 years in power. 

#hungary #viktororban #news

items.title: LIVE: Polls open in Peru election
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch our live coverage from a Lima polling station as Peruvians head to the polls to elect a new president and Congress. Follow live updates in Spanish here: https://bit.ly/4vF4Fuq

#peru #live</article>

items.title: Opposition leader Magyar votes in Hungary election that could unseat Orbán
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Hungarian prime-minister Viktor Orbán's top challenger, Péter Magyar voted on Sunday, as Hungarians were casting ballots  in what is widely seen as Europe's most consequential election this year, a vote that could unseat populist Orbán, an ally of U.S. President Donald Trump, after 16 years in power. 

#hungary #news

items.title: US and Iran end ceasefire talks as JD Vance heads home without agreement
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>The United States and Iran failed to reach an agreement at the end of historic, face-to-face talks after the U.S. said Tehran refused to commit to not developing a nuclear weapon, leaving uncertainty over a fragile, two-week ceasefire.

#iran #usa #news

items.title: Artemis II's moon-traveling astronauts speak after returning to Earth
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Artemis II's moon-traveling astronauts are back home and feted to a thunderous welcome. Still marveling over their record-breaking lunar fly-around, the crew of four flew to Houston's Ellington Field from San Diego on Saturday afternoon.

#artemis #space #nasa

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Trump downplays Iran negotiations, says deal ‘makes no difference’
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Speaking to reporters outside the White House on Saturday, U.S. President Donald Trump claimed military victory against Iran and downplayed the importance of ongoing ceasefire negotiations involving Vice President JD Vance because “regardless what happens we win.”

#trump #iran #news

items.title: 3 injured in New York subway stabbings as officers kill knife-wielding man
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>A man with a machete who attacked three people randomly at a major New York City subway station on Saturday morning was shot and killed by police, authorities said.

items.title: Pope Leo XIV blasts ‘delusion of omnipotence’ fueling US-Israel war in Iran
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>In his strongest words yet, Pope Leo XIV on Saturday denounced the “delusion of omnipotence” that is fueling the U.S.-Israel war in Iran and demanded political leaders stop and negotiate peace.

#iran #war #popeleoxiv
